release.new: Quick Cursor app is now an accessibility tool designed to support people with disabilities
release.info: update translations
add Ukrainian language

release.new: new tracker designs
add bottom edge action bar
release.info: hide trigger designs on screenshot action
fix brightness action config crash
fix volume action granular change on new Samsung versions
fix crashes
fix crashes
fix app picker dialog bug (launch app action, blacklist/icon pack app picker)
fix backup/restore crash
fix layout misalign
fix icon pack bug

release.new: add "Select All" action
add "Timed disable" action
"volume bar action" more granular for Samsung devices
add "Hide cursor" option to "Launch assistant" action
release.info: improve backup/restore on different screen resolutions
improve Material You colors setting
fix "volume bar action" for OnePlus/Oppo/Realme when app is in background
fix app picker dialog crash
fix backup/restore issue on "Simple triggers" on different resolution
fix cursor tap/gestures over tracker/triggers
update for Android 16 edge-to-edge enforcement
update to targetSdkVersion 36
update dependencies
update translations
Implement a better Android 15 bug workaround
fix settings bugs

release.new: add "Real-time gestures" action on Android 16 (drag & drop, swipe, scroll, etc)
add "Thinner triggers" option when keyboard is visible
release.info: add Android 15 click issue info and workarounds
fix settings crashes
fix free version settings reset bug
add trigger length customization (short, medium, tall) on simple triggers mode

release.new: Quick Cursor 2.0
Trigger actions
release.info: Pie actions - custom actions when you swipe vertically, diagonally or horizontally
Multi pie actions - an extra number of long swipe actions
Trigger actions designs
Tap and long tap trigger actions
release.new: Trigger design
release.info: Configurable rectangle design with some presets
Custom image
release.new: Foldable device support - different triggers config for each resolution and orientation
release.info: add "When keyboard opens" config
fix blacklist checkbox bug
cursor area fully configurable
tracker area scale from cursor area option
enhance brightness and volume bar actions
add 'Hide tracker after' option to tracker actions
enhance 'Toggle sound profile' action
update SDK to Android 15 (35)
update dependencies
update translations
release.new: Add new configs to the FREE version:
release.info: advanced triggers, some trigger designs and trigger actions presets
limited tracker actions, limited long and second tap actions
limited edge actions
8 cursor designs, cursor size and trail type
tracker size, hide on outside tap, vibration duration, visual feedback size, vibration on new cursr
workaround for Pixel 9 Fold black screen delay bug
increase maximum cursor speed on simple triggers mode
fix app not starting on reinstall on some devices
fix app crash on blacklist/whitelist app picker

release.new: Add support for Icon Packs
Samsung S Pen detection - disable while detached
release.info: fix tracker disappear when clicking the trigger
configurable long tap action duration
improve blacklist/whitelist app picker
add new 'relative' mode for volume/brightness actions
update dependencies (Google Play Billing library)
add Vietnamese translation
update translations
release.new: add 'toggle' option to expand notification and expand quick settings actions
edge action new visual option
add two finger bottom swipe action (Samsung multi-window shortcut)
add vertical option for Volume and Brightness bar actions
release.info: fix tracker actions center action bugs
fix bug on foldables that turned on the app when folding/closing the device
release.new: add foldable state auto pause (app can be configured to work only in one state)
release.info: Blacklist/Whitelist feature available in the FREE version
remove QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES permission
fix Surface Duo Android 12 bugs
fix Foldable landscape scale bug
update translations
add logcat message on new cursor
fix Samsung OneUI 6 lockscreen bug
fix gesture recorder bug: point remains visible on screen
fix toggle brightness action bug
fix pinch out/in naming

release.new: add new configs for "Change brightness" and "Change volume" actions
update dependencies and target Android 14
release.info: update translations
fix difference between Add new edge action and Add new tracker action
fix tracker action tabs bug
fix Automate action
add swipe duration config on swipe action
update "Change brightness", "Change volume", "Swipe", "Pinch", "Media volume" action config
release.new: add "Screenshot to clipboard" action
release.info: improve tap behaviour action picker
release.new: add "force rotation" mode on "Rotate screen" action
release.info: add Search on "Launch app" and "Launch shortcut" actions
release.new: add option for "windowed mode" in "Launch app" action
release.info: fix dynamic shortcut bug
add new experimental "vibration amplitude"
rename "vibration intensity" to "vibration duration"
fix "cursor action vibration" toggle not applying instantly
"toggle tracker actions always visible" action can be used inside tracker actions
"stop app" persistent after device restart
add "flip" option to cursor designs
update translations

release.new: add pinch in/out action
add increase, decrease and mute volume action
add rotate screen action
release.info: add dynamic icons for launcher shortcuts
add "create a flipped copy" in advanced mode
add "app enabled on lockscreen" in debug settings
add multi tap action
add multi touch support for long tap, double tap and swipe actions
add French translation
add Hindi translation
update translations
fix crash in zone/area editor settings
add 'Double tap' action
add calibration process for brightness slider action
refactor and improve launcher shortcuts
improve action picker
update translation tool
update translations
update dependencies
added Malayalam translation
fix Tasker, MacroDroid, Automate actions crash
fix tracker actions settings crash
fix shortcuts bug
change support email address to new support@quickcursor.app
fix bugs on "Launch shortcut" action

release.new: add 'Material You' support
release.info: add 'Cut' action
add 'Toggle auto tap' action
add 'missing permissions' page
add 'Hide cursor on tracker release' option
fix some UI in Edge actions settings
fix second tap action detection bug for OnePlus Android 13
update translations
fix crash on foldable devices
fix backup/restore screen resolution info. backups created in version 1.21.0 - 1.21.6 are missing screen resolution info because of a bug
actions can be chosen even if the system reports as not supported (some system wrongly reports support)
adjust swipe actions (miui quick settings, app menu open) to use the new swipe gesture action
increase the gesture recorder time limit
update translations
fix tracker actions bug with auto tap mode "on every release"
prevent triggering edge actions on floating tracker positioning
small bug fixes with tracker actions
fix crash in action picker dialog

release.new: add new feature: tracker actions
add new double tap tracker config
add new second tap config
"long tap" added to free version
add new actions: copy, swipe
add advanced actions: Tasker, MacroDroid and Automate
add material you themed icon support
add PRO subscription with trial option
release.info: added search on actions list
fix how to use dialog bug
change feedback "long click" to "cursor action"
fix gesture recorder issues. smoother on newer Android versions
add support for Android "dynamic shortcuts" because not all apps support classic shortcuts
add configurable extra space between triggers and keyboard when they are moved automatically above
fix keyboard height detection on some edge cases
fix settings crash
improve edge actions list requirements and info
fix a few settings crashes
moved FAQ from app to external Github page
update translations

release.new: new cursor designs
custom cursor design from own images
release.info: fix shortcuts in Android 13
update Chinese translations
new edge actions: "Long tap", "Start gesture recorder", "Cancel auto tap"
fix click bug when cursor, tracker and trigger are overlapping
fix "accessibility service bug" popup bug
fix "hide on fling" and "hide cursor" edge action with floating tracker mode
update translations
update dependencies and targetSdkVersion
update Play Store billing library

release.new: new "auto tap" mode: taps automatically on tracker release
release.info: fix bug with backup on Google Drive on some devices
reduce the app size by optimising some files
fix click bug when moving the cursor back to the initial position
fix "hide cursor" edge action bug
fix "Paste" edge action on website inputs inside Chrome (and other browsers)
fix bug with settings disabled when portrait mode is disabled
fix blacklist/whitelist loading crash bug
update Chinese translation

release.new: add Chinese simplified translation
release.info: update Dutch, Italian, Japan, Spanish, Portuguese (Brazil), Turkish translations

release.new: New edge actions features
release.info: add possibility to configure multiple edge actions per side
add edge action preview before triggering
add new types of edge actions: screenshot, flashlight, lockscreen, switch to prev app, power menu, brightness control and more
add new edge action trigger modes: instant, on release, delayed
release.new: free version: pull down notifications with Cursor (top edge action)
free version: keyboard detection is configurable
release.info: fix keyboard detection mechanism for Android 13
fix a bug with "triggers above" on landscape
remove Canvas drawer from debug menu
add 'Default' option on color preference dialog
FIXED Samsung Android 12 crash bug!
add accessibility service consent dialog (Google requirement for Android 12)
update targetSdkVersion to 31 (Android 12)
update third-party dependencies
add Portuguese (Brazil) translation
update translations
fix bug with gesture navigation on tracker fling
fix app detection bug for blacklist on Android 12
fix overlay bug when the app is stopped
update "Debug visuals" functionality

release.new: PRO version on sale between January 17-31: 0.99$

release.info: prepare for January sale
added Italian translation (Thanks to D4.gma)
added Arabic translation
added Japanese translation
added Romanian translation
fix landscape/portrait rotation bug in Quick Cursor settings
added new software for community translation help
updated multiple translations
changed font and adjusted layout
improved keyboard detection on Android 12
refactored and optimized keyboard/blacklist/whitelist detection mechanism
optimized app when keyboard and blacklist app detection are both turned off

release.new: long click shortcut from gesture recorder (advanced mode): release the tracker after the record starts
added "Thank you" page after buying PRO
add "hide on fling" feature (enabled by default)
release.info: fix crash on experimental canvas drawer
fix crash on swipe zones settings
fix some rare crashes
fix "how to use" bug
fix bug on dimension changes on Galaxy Fold
fix bug on dimension changes on Surface Duo
fix quick settings popup not opening bug
fix landscape default config bug

release.new: Landscape mode - fully customizable
Tablet support
release.info: add "Reset to default" warning popup on "How to use"

release.new: improve simple triggers config (more options and easier to config)
more trigger config for free version
release.info: fix cursor preview when cursor stroke size is bigger than cursor size
switch to limited mode manually instead of automatically in case of dispatch bug
add more debug options
fix wrong value displayed on Advanced mode edit

release.new: first stable version (no beta)
release.info: Please rate the new version on Play Store, the older "beta feedback" was only for developer (not public)
fix "Quick actions" bottom sheet back button bug
fix crash when settings are outside of min-max range
create adaptive icon
change icon to respect Android guidelines
fix error toast on unlocking phone
small crash fix

release.new: add support for devices with adjustable screens (foldable devices)
add support for devices with configurable resolution. scale preferences based on resolution change
release.info: refactor all size preferences to float
fix floating tracker mode with move triggers above keyboard bug
fix trail bug on "hide cursor" edge action
add new visual debugs
fix crash from Google Play store feedvback
fix crash introduced in 1.8.0 beta. Sorry for that!
fix bug with app shown as stopped in the main screen
fix bug on first use tutorial

release.new: add blacklist/whitelist functionality
release.info: add action to add an app to blacklist from Quick Settings
improve the debug system with debug logs
change the configurable long click distance threshold to be used for click also
fix quick settings popup bug
add configurable long click distance threshold
fix quick settings tile crash
fix not registered click on fast tracker tapping
update translations
add gesture recorder cancel edge action
add debug for Quick Actions popup to identify a bug
fix some crashes on app opening reported on Play Store
add Russian translation (thanks to Alex Procopovich)
fix translation bug on Quick Actions popup
fix temporarily pause feature on Android 11
fix crash on first use tutorial
add info about how to prevent Android killing the app
fix gesture replay crash
fix start/stop app bug
update accessibility service tutorial design and screenshot
add how to use tutorial on the main screen
update PRO features description and layout
improve debug logging
update main app activity design
fix top crashes from Google Play store reports
fix crash with trail effect on some edge case
fix crash on edge cases clicking outside screen
fix crash on quick settings tile add
fix bug when clicking with cursor on the tracker (or gesture replay on tracker)
fix wrong edge tracker position on floating mode
fix gesture recorder animation when dot color is the same as recorder trail color
fix FPS debug text in debug mode
try to fix bug with keyboard detection after app update (fixed by an app restart)
add Kurdish translation (thanks to Alân Yalçın)
update Turkish translations (thanks to Alân Yalçın)
fix annoying "service interrupted by Android" toast message on some devices
add German translation (thanks to Holger Hartwig)
fix shortcut with Tap-tap app
fix shortcut toggle bug
fix stuck click animation with ripple duration too low
fix click animation not updating in real time when changing ripple duration and size
fix app not starting after landscape mode in some devices
change cursor when recording gesture
add cursor animation on click (need to enable visual feedback on click)
add toggle zone app shortcut

release.new: add trail animation
release.info: improve drawing performance by unifying all drawings (cursor, tracker, ripple, trail, etc)
improve animations
fix wrong detection of accessibility service as stopped
fix "accessibility settings" button not opening menu in some edge cases
fix crash on accessibility service tutorial slider
fix haptic feedback lag on some devices (ex: OnePlus)
add more features to "debug mode"
add a reset to default for all settings
fix bug with preferences format and with backup (not a breaking change)
fix bug with backup not exporting the default values
update translations
fix Firefox Beta bug by increasing the time of the simulated tap from 1ms to 5ms
possible fix for a backup bug

release.new: add translations: Dutch, Polish, Spanish, Turkish
release.info: fix wrong alignment of disable service
change warning icon

release.new: add backup and restore functionality for all settings
release.info: fix edge actions wrong defaults

release.new: add option to not block the system gesture navigation with triggers/tracker because of the OnePlus bug
release.info: fix wrong cursor position when using the app shortcuts (trigger the cursor from another apps)
fix overlapping triggers when multiple triggers are moved above keyboard
use semantic versioning MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH (major for incompatible changes, minor for new features, patch for bug fixing)
refactor all screen coordinates and sizes
refactor all defaults and constants
refactor horizontal/vertical to left/top
release.new: all size or positioning preferences have been reset to work with the new system
release.info: fix wrong positions on devices with cutouts
fix pixelated cursor/tracker/ripple by enabling smooth anti aliasing
fix bug with turn off/on
change information in FAQ

release.new: add new debug mode for better remote debugging
fix keyboard detection bug in Android 11 (change the detection mechanism)
release.info: fix keyboard detection bug when opening the status bar
fix keyboard detection bug with AnySoft keyboard
fix bug on first tutorial auto start
fix bug with gesture recorder together with disable triggers when keyboard is visible
release.new: fix stop/start bugs when the app is stopped from combinations of quick toggles/app shortcuts/temporarily disable etc
release.info: disable/enable the Android System Bug popup
move quick actions menu above navigation bar

release.new: add quick settings tile to toggle start/stop
release.info: add a way to stop the app without disabling the accessibility service
refactor the old stop the app into specific "disable service" button
fix shortcut glitch that happens randomly
add new shortcuts (start, stop, toggle and hide cursor) that can be triggered by launcher or from other apps (tasker, fluid navigation gesture, etc)
fix crash on application startup on some devices
revert update of third party library that caused the above crash
fix bug with 'limited mode' in the free version
fix problems with PRO overlay in the free version for tap behaviour
fix gesture recorder preview trail position on some devices

release.new: added gesture support in advanced mode (drag and drop, scroll, swipe, etc)
release.info: updated dev libraries
highlight the Quick Cursor accessibility service on Android settings open
improve first run of the app

release.new: implemented an experimental 'limited mode' for those where the app stops working after some time or doesn't work at all
release.info: prepare settings UI for a more advanced mode that supports gesture (swipe, drag, scroll, etc)
fix a bug with changelog popup
add button for changelog popup in About section
fix a bug with slider preference
fix multiple floating bubbles bug
add description on list preferences for better UI (when keyboard is visible, edge actions, swipe mode, etc)
change almost all sliders in the settings with a new one
fix tracker glitch on "hide cursor" edge action
fix frame drops on "hide cursor" visual feedback (ripple)

release.new: add changelog popup on first use after update
release.info: fix bug on "hide cursor" edge action
add info when the accessibility service can't send gesture anymore (in some devices)
fix bug on tap not recognized as tap on OnePlus launcher in some scenario
fix bug with "Hide cursor" edge action when triggered faster than the reveal animation
fix bug when tracker is tapped when the hide animation is in progress
fix crash on first time use tutorial slide
fix crash on phone rotate
fix crash on long click through trigger zone
fix crash when trying to detect the keyboard open/close
fix crash on tutorial auto slide
fix crash when stopping the app
fix crash on click
fix bug: QC activated while the keyboard was visible on some keyboard apps actions (many SwiftKey actions, share dialog from Google Keyboard, etc)
fix bug: connection to Google Play store remained open in some cases and the "buy pro" dialog was displayed any time the connection was reconnected
fix bug: show the toast "PRO version activated" more times, in some rare situations, after the PRO was bought
fix bug with buy pro Google Play popup randomly appear in some rare situation on the free version
sorry to all free users that had this bug, this was not intentional to spam the pro version, it should be fixed now

release.new: add "FAQ and troubleshooting" based on all the feedback received

release.info: try to fix "Open Settings" from "Quick Settings" on some phones
clean up some old code
fix some leaked IntentReceiver
fix crash with raise triggers above keyboard on landscape
fix QC enabled on landscape on keyboard action
fix bug with some lock screen configurations that never re-enabled the QC after phone unlock

release.new: disable QC on lock screen
release.info: fix bug with quick settings opening when phone is locked / unlocked
fix trigger size not saving correctly on simple mode with location bottom

release.new: add accessibility tutorial for Samsung
add accessibility tutorial for Xiaomi

release.info: fix bug on accessibility service enabled and exit back to tutorial

release.new: add share button in About section
add tutorial for how to enable accessibility service on generic device
add first time use tutorial
release.info: add trigger size config on first time use tutorial
fixed bug on advanced mode: cursor height was not saved correctly
